About Story Now Projects Journal CV
Story

My journey: from humble beginnings in Obuasi to business growth leadership.

I am Thomas Nyarko Hayford. This page tells my biography in simple words from childhood, school, university, and career growth.

Message on LinkedIn Send WhatsApp Message

Open CV

Biography

I was born in Obuasi and raised in a modest environment where discipline, respect, and consistency mattered. My early education started at Holy Child Preparatory and JHS, where I learned the value of effort and character.

In 2009, I moved to Sekondi-Takoradi for senior high school and attended St. John's School - Sekondi. From 2009 to 2013 I studied General Arts and passed WASSCE, which opened the door to university.

In 2014, I proceeded to the University of Cape Coast and studied B.A. Social Science (Economics and Geography). After school, I worked through HR support, data verification, testing, and operations roles before moving into relationship and growth work.

Today I work as a Relationship Manager at Hubtel and I also founded Iderwell. My approach is simple: support people well, execute consistently, and grow outcomes with structure.

Interactive Life Timeline

Select each stage to see how my path evolved from school foundations to business leadership.

Obuasi: where my story started

I was born in Obuasi. My background was humble, and that shaped my values early: consistency, humility, and hard work.

Holy Child Preparatory and JHS

These years formed my basic discipline and learning habits. I learned to take school seriously and stay focused even when things were difficult.

St. John's School - Sekondi (2009-2013)

I moved to Sekondi-Takoradi in 2009, studied General Arts at St. John's School - Sekondi, and passed WASSCE in 2013.

University of Cape Coast (from 2014)

I continued to UCC in 2014 and studied B.A. Social Science (Economics and Geography), which sharpened my analytical and practical thinking.

Career foundation roles

My early roles in HR support, data verification, software testing, and operations gave me process discipline and execution quality.

Hubtel progression and founding Iderwell

I joined Hubtel in 2023 and progressed to Relationship Manager in March 2025, while also building Iderwell to support business growth with clear systems.

Public Activity Timeline

I also maintain a curated timeline from my authored LinkedIn posts. It captures learning milestones, recruitment reflections, and career transition signals in one place.

Open LinkedIn highlights timeline See learning highlights

What This Journey Taught Me

Relationships matter

Sustainable growth is built on trust and consistent support.

Process creates calm

Clear systems reduce stress and improve delivery quality.

Simple language wins

Complex ideas should be explained in practical words people can use.
